title: Restructure directive SKILL.md into routing map + modular docs
description: The directive SKILL.md is 1389 lines / 75KB — a monolith that fills agent context windows. Split it into a ~120-line routing map (step labels + one-line descriptions + file references) and modular docs under docs/pipeline/ (one file per step or step-group) and docs/reference/ (schemas, templates, rules). The routing map is what agents load; they pull in step docs on-demand. This is the enabling project — every other harness initiative depends on SKILL.md being navigable and modular.

in: Split SKILL.md into routing map + docs/pipeline/*.md + docs/reference/*.md
Routing map: step ID, one-line purpose, file path, conditional logic
Pipeline docs: one file per step or logical step-group
Reference docs: schemas (Morgan plan JSON, reviewer JSON, checkpoint JSON), templates (digest, approval), rules (ALWAYS rules, failure handling)
Verify agents can still execute directives end-to-end after restructure
Update Alex spawn prompt to reference routing map instead of inlining full SKILL.md
out: Changing pipeline logic or step ordering

dod.criterion: SKILL.md is <150 lines and contains only routing logic + file references
Every step from the original SKILL.md exists in exactly one docs/pipeline/*.md file
All JSON schemas, templates, and rules are in docs/reference/*.md files
A directive can be executed end-to-end using the new structure (manual smoke test)
No content is lost — diff of concatenated new files vs original SKILL.md shows only structural changes
Alex spawn prompt references routing map, not inlined SKILL.md

checklist: ls docs/pipeline/ shows files covering all steps (0a through 7 + failure handling)
ls docs/reference/ shows schema, template, and rules files
Run a lightweight directive end-to-end and confirm it completes
grep for every ## Step heading from original — each must appear in exactly one pipeline doc

reviewers.domain: architecture — no content lost, file references resolve, agent context savings achieved
process — routing map is navigable, step ordering preserved, conditional logic clear

tasks.title: Inventory SKILL.md sections and map to target file structure
Create docs/pipeline/ files — extract each step into its own doc
Create docs/reference/ files — extract schemas, templates, rules
Rewrite SKILL.md as routing map with step IDs and file references
Update Alex spawn prompt to reference routing map instead of inlined SKILL.md
Content-loss audit — diff concatenated new files vs original SKILL.md
Smoke test — run a lightweight directive end-to-end with new structure
